name: acme.analytics.warehouse.bank_code_mapping
description: Master mapping table for bank codes used across Acme payment flows. Maps internal bank codes to standardized external codes. Critical for fund channel routing and reconciliation.

name: acme.analytics.warehouse.identity_mart
description: Identity (Know Your Customer) mart table. Aggregated Identity status and verification data for Acme users. Used for compliance reporting, risk scoring, and user segmentation. Rebuilt daily.

name: acme.analytics.warehouse.last_n_action_log
description: User action log for the last N days. Captures all in-app user actions (clicks, navigation, feature usage) for behavioral analysis, funnel tracking, and personalization. Partitioned by date.

name: acme.analytics.warehouse.last_n_event_log
description: Event log for the last N days. Structured event stream capturing user interaction events. Downstream from action_log, used for real-time analytics, A/B testing, and Growth team reporting.

name: acme.analytics.warehouse.qrpay_user
description: QrPay-enabled user dimension table. Tracks which Acme users have linked QrPay-compatible bank accounts. Used for QrPay payment eligibility checks and adoption reporting.

name: acme.analytics.warehouse.qrpay_user_translog
description: QrPay transaction log per user. Records all QrPay-initiated transactions with metadata (amount, bank, timestamp). Source for QrPay adoption metrics and reconciliation reports.

name: acme.secure.config.partner.api.app_info
description: App integration information table for merchant payment ecosystem. Stores SDK integration metadata, API access keys, and app platform (iOS/Android/Web). Reference for merchant developer support.

name: acme.secure.config.partner.api.merchant_category
description: Merchant category classification table. Maps each merchant to MCCs (Merchant Category Codes). Used for cashback eligibility, spending analytics, and compliance reporting.

name: acme.secure.config.partner.api.merchant_info
description: Merchant information master table. Stores all registered merchant profiles: merchant ID, business name, category, settlement account, and compliance status. Central reference for merchant-facing analytics.

name: acme.secure.lending_svc.installment.loan_core_account
description: Credit (Buy Now Pay Later) core account table. Stores the primary account records for all Credit users including credit limit, account status, and registration metadata. Source of truth for Credit account lifecycle.

name: acme.secure.lending_svc.installment.loan_core_bill
description: Credit billing table. Stores repayment bill records generated per installment cycle. Tracks due dates, payment status, penalty amounts, and repayment history per Credit account.

name: acme.secure.lending_svc.installment.loan_core_order
description: Credit order table. Captures each Credit purchase order created by users, including merchant info, order amount, installment plan, and status. Core transactional table for Credit payment flow.

name: acme.secure.lending_svc.installment.loan_core_user
description: Credit user profile table. Stores user-level Credit enrollment information including eligibility status, credit score tier, and onboarding date. Joined with account data for user-level risk analysis.

name: acme.analytics.curated.credit.loan_statement_fact
description: Credit statement fact — fact table sao kê hàng tháng (outstanding, minimum due) build từ loan_core_statement. Dùng cho báo cáo & dashboard lending.

name: acme.analytics.curated.credit.loan_payment_fact
description: Credit payment fact — fact giao dịch thanh toán khoản vay Credit theo kỳ.

name: acme.analytics.curated.credit.loan_repayment_fact
description: Credit repayment fact — fact trả nợ/đáo hạn khoản Credit.

name: acme.analytics.curated.credit.loan_fee_fact
description: Credit fee fact — fact phí và phí phạt phát sinh trên khoản Credit.

name: acme.analytics.curated.credit.loan_disbursement_fact
description: Consumer Loan disbursement fact — fact giải ngân khoản vay tiêu dùng.

name: acme.analytics.curated.credit.loan_account_dim
description: Credit account dimension — dim tài khoản Credit (credit limit, trạng thái) từ loan_core_account.

name: acme.analytics.curated.credit.user_profile_dim
description: User profile dimension — dim hồ sơ người dùng lending (demographic, eligibility).

name: acme.analytics.curated.credit.product_code_dim
description: Product code dimension — dim mã sản phẩm lending.

name: acme.analytics.curated.credit.bank_code_dim
description: Bank code dimension — dim mã ngân hàng phục vụ đối soát lending/payment.
